validationRules.description: Close Date is mandatory on all Opportunities
validationRules.errorMessage: Close Date is required. Please enter a valid future close date.

validationRules.description: Amount mandatory from Needs Analysis stage onwards
validationRules.errorMessage: Amount is required at Needs Analysis stage and beyond. Please enter an opportunity value.

validationRules.description: Win/Loss Reason mandatory when stage is Closed Lost
validationRules.errorMessage: Win/Loss Reason is required when closing a deal as Lost. Please select a reason.
